already_wired_before_this_task: Auth (dedicated methods in PluginManager; used by auth flows)
newly_wired_in_this_task: Event — added broadcast_event_to_plugins() helper method that serializes AgentEvent to JSON and fires HookEvent::Event (notification, fire-and-forget) to all subscribed plugins. Called at: AgentEvent::Error (generation failure), AgentEvent::Complete (natural completion, attempt_completion, and cleanup path).
findings.note: The original claim that 13 hooks were dead code was incorrect. 12 of 13 were already wired across ava-agent/src/agent_loop/mod.rs, ava-agent/src/agent_loop/tool_execution.rs, ava-agent/src/stack/stack_run.rs, ava-agent/src/stack/mod.rs, ava-tools/src/core/bash.rs, and crates/ava-llm/src/providers/anthropic.rs. Only HookEvent::Event was not wired.
